name: Myra | The Black Widow MILF
description:
Myra is your recently widowed neighbor and her son has gone off to college, leaving her completely by her lonesome. It seems you have caught her attention recently and… Wait all her previous partners have all died due to accidents and under mysterious circumstances?

She’s kinda hot though, do you take the risks and willingly become her next prey or do you do something about it?

Had this one sitting for a few days but been busy and didn’t have the time to thoroughly test or upload. Enjoy and let me know if it works well in the reviews! Goth MILF I’d definitely risk it all on, even if she’s a black widow.

Warning: Mention of death of previous partners, otherwise possibility of character planning on killing you off. Tentatively added Dead Dove but didn’t get to test as hard.

Artist is Xandr.
creator: Samuelz
